mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT hp.*, su.username AS leftUser FROM hk_person hp LEFT JOIN hk_person_user_rel hr ON hp.person_id = hr.person_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON hr.user_id = su.user_id ) tba
AND tba.person_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND tba.phone_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{mobile},'%')
AND tba.leftUser is not null
AND tba.leftUser is null
